resources.string: Allow customers to add a tip when paying. Tip presets will appear as quick-select buttons on the payment screen.
Configure quick-select tip percentages. Customers can also enter a custom amount.
Could not add preset (may already exist or at max capacity)
Reset tip presets to default values (5%, 10%, 15%, 20%)?
Would you like to add a tip?
Failed to prepare NDEF payment data
No apps available to share this token
This payment could not be completed. You can try again or start a new charge.
No funds were transferred — it\'s safe to retry.
Accept Bitcoin payments instantly with zero fees.
Accept Bitcoin payments instantly with zero fees using Cashu ecash technology.
By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
Choose how you\'d like to get started
Start fresh with a new seed phrase
Tap to learn how Numo works.
Enter an amount, tap charge, and your customer holds their phone to yours. Payment lands instantly over NFC.
Set up auto-withdraw to move incoming payments straight to your own Lightning wallet.
Numo is fully open-source and charges no fees. No subscriptions, no cuts, no hidden costs. Every sat you receive is yours.
Enter the words in the correct order to restore your wallet.
Please paste a valid 12-word seed phrase
This will only take a moment
Checking Nostr relays for your mint configuration
This mint will hold your bitcoin. You can withdraw to your own wallet at any time, or set a payout threshold to do it automatically.
Withdraw to your own wallet anytime, or set a payout threshold to do it automatically.
Your wallet is ready to use
Restoring from a seed phrase will replace your current wallet. Make sure you have backed up your current seed phrase before proceeding.

This will restore your wallet from the entered seed phrase.

⚠️ IMPORTANT:
• Make sure you have backed up your current seed phrase
• This action cannot be undone
• Restore will be attempted for %1$d selected mint(s)

%2$s
Your current seed phrase starts with: \"%1$s...\"
Your wallet has been successfully restored
Please select at least one mint to restore.
Anyone with these 12 words can access your funds. Write them down and store them in a safe place. Never share them with anyone.
Make sure to clear your clipboard after pasting

"NUMO WALLET - TERMS OF SERVICE

1. ACCEPTANCE
By using this wallet application, you agree to these terms.

2. NATURE OF SERVICE
This is a self-custodial Bitcoin wallet using Cashu ecash technology. You are solely responsible for your funds and seed phrase.

3. SEED PHRASE
Your 12-word seed phrase is the ONLY way to recover your wallet. Never share it. Store it securely offline. We cannot recover lost seed phrases.

4. NO WARRANTY
This software is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. Use at your own risk.

5. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
We are not liable for any loss of funds, whether through bugs, user error, or third-party mint failures.

6. ECASH MINTS
Ecash tokens are held by third-party mints. These mints may fail or become unavailable. Diversify across multiple mints.

7. PRIVACY
This wallet does not collect personal data. Transactions are processed through ecash mints which may have their own privacy policies.

8. UPDATES
These terms may be updated. Continued use constitutes acceptance.

Last updated: November 2024"
Create menu items or products so you can charge with a single tap instead of typing amounts.
Only fetch invoice when Lightning tab is selected
⚠️ Developer settings are for testing and debugging purposes only. Use with caution.
View and export recent error logs
NFC is required for tap to pay. Please enable it in settings.
This card type isn\'t supported yet
Not enough funds on this card — ask the customer to top up or use another payment method
This card requires a PIN, which isn\'t supported yet
The card couldn\'t be read. Try tapping again. (Code: 0x%04X)
Tap lost — hold the card steady and try again
Something went wrong. Try again — no funds were transferred.
Processing payment...\nYou can lift your phone
Insufficient balance. Amount + fees (%1$d sats) exceeds your balance (%2$d sats). Try an amount under %3$d sats.
The fee reserve will be returned if the Lightning fee is lower.
Payment is pending. Please check back later.
Please keep the device awake while we complete your transfer
This usually takes less than 10 seconds. You can safely leave this screen once completed.
After your first charge, you\'ll see a record of every payment received.
Manage your product catalog for quick checkout.
Tap + to add your first item
Select a category or create a new one.
Set a fixed price in your preferred currency. Bitcoin prices are in satoshis (sats).
Another item already uses this barcode
Another item already uses this SKU
Sats must be a whole number
Get notified when stock is running low.
This item will be permanently removed from your catalog.
Optional — for items with barcodes or internal tracking codes.
Creates a new item with this variation
Add at least one mint in Settings → Mints before charging customers.
Network connection is required to open pending payments.
Network connection is required to create a charge.
Give your basket a name to find it easily later.
Leave empty to use default name
Update the name for this basket.
Save a basket to keep it open for later.\nPerfect for tabs or restaurant tables.
Completed orders will appear here.\nPerfect for tracking sales history.
Create preset names for quick basket saving.\nPerfect for restaurant tables or customer orders.
Add names for quick basket saving
Examples: Table 1, Table 2, VIP, Takeout, John\'s Order
Create a quick-select name for baskets
Remove all preset names? This cannot be undone.
Automatically send funds to your Lightning wallet when balance exceeds a threshold
Set a payout threshold and lightning address to automatically withdraw when your balance reaches the limit.
Automatically withdraw when balance exceeds threshold
Funds will be sent to this address automatically
Trigger withdrawal when balance reaches this amount
Percentage of balance to withdraw (keep some for fees)
When auto-withdraw is enabled, your payments are sent to your wallet automatically. Activity will show here.
You can quickly change the default payment method directly from the payment screen by long-pressing on any of the Unified, Cashu, or Lightning tabs.
Send funds to Lightning invoice or address
No balance available to withdraw. Add funds to your wallet first.
Choose which mint to withdraw from
Paste an invoice to pay instantly
Send to an email-like lightning address
Camera permission is required to scan QR codes
Enter mint URL or scan QR code
Point camera at mint QR code
Add a mint to get started with ecash
Remove %1$s? Any balance in this mint will be lost.
Invalid mint URL. Please check and try again.
Reset to default mints? This will remove all custom mints.
All Lightning payments will be received to this mint. Tap any mint below to set it as your Lightning mint.
When enabled, tokens from unknown mints are automatically swapped into your Lightning mint.
Clear all stored error logs? This cannot be undone.
"You won't be able to recover funds sent to this request if you delete it."
Choose a 4–16 digit PIN to protect sensitive settings
Enter your 12-word recovery phrase to reset your PIN. Your existing PIN will be removed and you can set a new one.
Are you sure you want to proceed?
Tap a device to your phone to receive payment
